recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: KM 31: Kilometer 31
recommendations.overview: While driving through the kilometer 31 of a lonely road, Agata Hameran hits a boy. She leaves her car to help the victim and another car runs over her and she falls in a deep coma. Her twin sister Catalina telepathically feels the pain of Agata and h

recommendations.title: Blackwater Lane
recommendations.overview: An American school teacher in England drives past an abandoned car late one night, unaware that the driver was the victim of a murder. As she comes to terms with the realization, seemingly supernatural events start to affect the gothic manor she live

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: House of the Long Shadows
recommendations.overview: An American writer goes to a remote Welsh manor on a $20,000 bet that he can write a classic novel like 'Wuthering Heights' in 24 hours. However, upon his arrival he discovers that the apparently empty manor has several rather odd inhabitants.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Errementari: The Blacksmith and the Devil
recommendations.overview: Basque Country, Spain, 1843. A police constable arrives at a small village in Álava to investigate a mysterious blacksmith who lives alone deep in the woods.
